heroHeadline: Amnesty Warns of 'Stage for Repression'; Six World Cup Finals Tomorrow
heroSubtitle: Amnesty's 'Humanity Must Win' report flags human rights emergency with 73 days to kickoff; Iraq squad arrives Monterrey via overland ordeal; Italy face hostile Zenica vs Bosnia; USMNT face Portugal in final pre-tournament test; Bolivia vs Iraq, Jamaica vs DR Congo finals decide last 2 World Cup spots Mar 31
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, Amnesty International, American Immigration Council
